GoEntryPointDiscoveryState.description: State model derived from GoEntryPointDiscovery TLA+ spec

ValidEntryTypes.description: Verifier for invariant ValidEntryTypes from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

MainHasCorrectName.message:
MainHasCorrectName violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "MAIN" => ep.function_name = "main"
MainHasCorrectName.description: Verifier for invariant MainHasCorrectName from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

MainNeverPublicApi.message:
MainNeverPublicApi violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.function_name = "main" => ep.entry_type /= "PUBLIC_API"
MainNeverPublicApi.description: Verifier for invariant MainNeverPublicApi from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

PublicOnlyForLibrary.message:
PublicOnlyForLibrary violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "PUBLIC_API" => codebase_type = "library"
PublicOnlyForLibrary.description: Verifier for invariant PublicOnlyForLibrary from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

HttpRouteHasRoute.message:
HttpRouteHasRoute violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "HTTP_ROUTE" => ep.route /= "none"
HttpRouteHasRoute.description: Verifier for invariant HttpRouteHasRoute from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

HandleFuncMethodAgnostic.message:
HandleFuncMethodAgnostic violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        (ep.entry_type = "HTTP_ROUTE" /\ ep.route_type = "handlefunc") =>
        ep.method ...
HandleFuncMethodAgnostic.description: Verifier for invariant HandleFuncMethodAgnostic from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

GinRouteHasMethod.message:
GinRouteHasMethod violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.route_type = "gin" => ep.method /= "none"
GinRouteHasMethod.description: Verifier for invariant GinRouteHasMethod from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

NoDuplicates.message:
NoDuplicates violation: \A ep1 \in entry_points : \A ep2 \in entry_points :
        (ep1.file_path = ep2.file_path /\
         ep1.function_n...
NoDuplicates.description: Verifier for invariant NoDuplicates from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

MethodsNeverPublicApi.message:
MethodsNeverPublicApi violation: \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "PUBLIC_API" => ep.has_receiver = FALSE
MethodsNeverPublicApi.description: Verifier for invariant MethodsNeverPublicApi from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_ValidEntryTypes.message:
Assertion failed: ValidEntryTypes — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type \in {"MAIN", "PUBLIC_API", "HTTP_ROUTE", "CLI_COMMAND"}
assert_ValidEntryTypes.description: Test assertion for ValidEntryTypes from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_MainHasCorrectName.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "MAIN" implies ep.function_name = "main"
assert_MainHasCorrectName.message:
Assertion failed: MainHasCorrectName — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "MAIN" => ep.function_name = "main"
assert_MainHasCorrectName.description: Test assertion for MainHasCorrectName from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_MainNeverPublicApi.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        ep.function_name = "main" implies ep.entry_type /= "PUBLIC_API"
assert_MainNeverPublicApi.message:
Assertion failed: MainNeverPublicApi — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.function_name = "main" => ep.entry_type /= "PUBLIC_API"
assert_MainNeverPublicApi.description: Test assertion for MainNeverPublicApi from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_PublicOnlyForLibrary.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "PUBLIC_API" implies codebase_type = "library"
assert_PublicOnlyForLibrary.message:
Assertion failed: PublicOnlyForLibrary — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "PUBLIC_API" => codebase_type = "library"
assert_PublicOnlyForLibrary.description: Test assertion for PublicOnlyForLibrary from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_HttpRouteHasRoute.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "HTTP_ROUTE" implies ep.route /= "none"
assert_HttpRouteHasRoute.message:
Assertion failed: HttpRouteHasRoute — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "HTTP_ROUTE" => ep.route /= "none"
assert_HttpRouteHasRoute.description: Test assertion for HttpRouteHasRoute from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_HandleFuncMethodAgnostic.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        (ep.entry_type = "HTTP_ROUTE" and ep.route_type = "handlefunc") implies
        ep.method = "none"
assert_HandleFuncMethodAgnostic.message:
Assertion failed: HandleFuncMethodAgnostic — \A ep \in entry_points :
        (ep.entry_type = "HTTP_ROUTE" /\ ep.route_type = "handlefunc") =>
        ep.method ...
assert_HandleFuncMethodAgnostic.description: Test assertion for HandleFuncMethodAgnostic from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_GinRouteHasMethod.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        ep.route_type = "gin" implies ep.method /= "none"
assert_GinRouteHasMethod.message:
Assertion failed: GinRouteHasMethod — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.route_type = "gin" => ep.method /= "none"
assert_GinRouteHasMethod.description: Test assertion for GinRouteHasMethod from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_NoDuplicates.condition:
\A ep1 in entry_points : \A ep2 in entry_points :
        (ep1.file_path = ep2.file_path and
         ep1.function_name = ep2.function_name) implies
        ep1 = ep2
assert_NoDuplicates.message:
Assertion failed: NoDuplicates — \A ep1 \in entry_points : \A ep2 \in entry_points :
        (ep1.file_path = ep2.file_path /\
         ep1.function_n...
assert_NoDuplicates.description: Test assertion for NoDuplicates from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_MethodsNeverPublicApi.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "PUBLIC_API" implies ep.has_receiver = FALSE
assert_MethodsNeverPublicApi.message:
Assertion failed: MethodsNeverPublicApi — \A ep \in entry_points :
        ep.entry_type = "PUBLIC_API" => ep.has_receiver = FALSE
assert_MethodsNeverPublicApi.description: Test assertion for MethodsNeverPublicApi from GoEntryPointDiscovery spec
